checks.name: live Splunk Docker and official MCP proof captured with bounded claim
publication boundary text
checks.detail: This release integrity manifest is local readback evidence only. It does not publish, upload, connect to Splunk, configure MCP, write approved URLs, update Devpost, or submit anything.

boundary: This release integrity manifest is local readback evidence only. It does not publish, upload, connect to Splunk, configure MCP, write approved URLs, update Devpost, or submit anything.
recommended_next_step: Review this manifest before approving public GitHub, public demo video, optional Splunk/MCP proof, URL writeback, or Devpost final submission.
